hypothesis: Pre-outcome hashed cognitive and computational records may correlate with later independent 3I/ATLAS-related scientific/publication events above predefined thresholds.
null_hypothesis: Observed correlations are explained by chance, broad prediction language, publication frequency, shared information sources, or post-hoc interpretation.
replication_requirement: At least 3 qualifying clusters across separate publication events.
negative_null_policy: No match is bounded non-detection, not proof of absence.

status_policy.T4: score < 0.40 or retrospective or ambiguous source
status_policy.T3: score >= 0.40, pre-hashed, independent source, but not replicated
status_policy.T2_candidate: score >= 0.65, pre-outcome hash true, T1/T2 physical source, specificity >= 0.75, 3 independent clusters, controls lower than real run, no KB contamination
status_policy.T2_validated: not available in XDOMAIN-002 alone; requires external replication
